---
title: "Introduction to Movement Metrics"
author: "Wenjing Xu 徐雯靓 (wenjing.xu@senckenberg.de)"
date: '`r format(Sys.time(), "%d %B %Y")`'
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: 
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: true
    number_sections: false
    #theme: united
    #highlight: tango
pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) # display both code and results 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.pos = 'H')
```

--------------------------------------------------------

# Introduction
Linear infrastructure ... 



In this exercise, we will cover:

1. xx
    + xx

## Load Libraries and data
Load the required libraries and remove everything held in [R's](https://cran.r-project.org/) memory.


`BaBA` is not hosted on CRAN and needs to be installed directly from GitHub: 
```{r install and load BaBA}
require("devtools")
devtools::install_github("wx-ecology/BaBA") ## <<--- may need to install locally
```


```{r packages, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Remove from memory
rm(list=ls())

library(tidyverse, quietly = TRUE) 
library(leaflet,quietly = TRUE)
library(RColorBrewer)  # for color palettes
library(sf)


# load data and filter out the unreliable locations
load("./Data/wildebeest_data.rdata")

WB <- WB %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  filter(
    fixType == "3D" & as.numeric(DOP) < 10 | fixType == "2D" & as.numeric(DOP)  < 5)


fence = st_read("./Data/Fences2010_UTM37S.shp")

```

# Types of Barrier Behaviors 

<div style="float:right">
![Barrier behaviour categories classified by Barrier Behaviour Analysis.](./Figures/BABA.jpg)
# data prep

```{r data prep}

WB.sf <- WB %>% 
  rename(Animal.ID = id, date = timestamp) %>%
  st_as_sf(., coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = st_crs(4326))

```


```{r data transform}

WB.sf <- WB.sf %>% 
  st_transform( st_crs = st_crs(fence))

# turn to lines

```

# visualize movement and fences



</div>



|           <span style="color:tomato">**QUESTION x: ** xxxxx. </span>
<br/><br/>

---------------------
Further readings:

+



 <center> -----------------     (ﾉ◕ヮ◕)ﾉ*:･ﾟ✧  THE END :･ﾟ･ﾟ     ------------------ </center>
